failure_modes.text: Teams waste time and cognitive energy when they keep adding detail without clarifying the essential core of the problem.
failure_modes.source_quote: It requires the practitioner to relentlessly prioritize and be a master of exclusion.
failure_modes.mitigation: Cut detail until the essential core of the problem is clear; every additional layer must earn its place by changing the decision.

failure_modes.text: Communication can fail when simplification removes the causal structure people need, or when unnecessary intricacy overloads working memory.
failure_modes.source_quote: The human brain has limits on its working memory.
failure_modes.mitigation: Match simplification to the audience: ensure the causal structure people need to act is preserved while extraneous intricacy is removed.

failure_modes.text: Complexity-bias-resistance becomes crude reduction when simplicity is used to erase nuance instead of to protect what matters.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when the model is used to adopt inaccurate, oversimplified models.
failure_modes.mitigation: Guard against crude reduction: simplicity that erases nuance is as dangerous as complexity that buries it; the goal is clarity, not minimalism.

premortem_questions.text: What is the essential core of this problem, and what detail is decorative rather than decision-bearing?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Focus resources only on the essential core of the problem.

premortem_questions.text: Which part of our explanation is too compressed to preserve the real causal structure?
premortem_questions.source_quote: The model works against unnecessary intricacy or superficial oversimplification.

premortem_questions.text: Where are we boiling the ocean because we have not defined what output the work is supposed to produce?
premortem_questions.source_quote: This prevents the wasteful effort of boiling the ocean.

heuristics.text: Simplify until the core is clear, but stop before the causal structure is destroyed.
heuristics.source_quote: The disciplined commitment to simplicity and clarity.

heuristics.text: Use ruthless prioritization to decide what belongs in the reasoning path and what should be excluded.
Treat needless complexity and lazy oversimplification as twin errors rather than as opposites where one side is always safe.
heuristics.source_quote: Actively working against the natural human inclination to either introduce needless complexity or adopt inaccurate, oversimplified models.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the chunks on essential-core discipline, anti-ocean-boiling, and protecting causal structure while simplifying.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader presentation-advice sprawl beyond the clearest reasoning and planning moves.
open_questions: The source supports multiple communication use cases, but the Wave 2 surface stays on complexity discipline in reasoning.

allies: The raw source is strongest alongside simplification, prioritization, and critical-thinking style pruning.
antagonists: The model pushes against both decorative complexity and misleading oversimplification.
structured_tensions: The main tension is between clarity and loss of essential causal nuance.
